description: Ian Cummings discusses the launch of Photo Finish Live, a real money horse racing game on Solana, highlighting its unique features and mainstream appeal. He addresses challenges in the Web3 gaming space and emphasizes the need for more quality games and partnerships.
topic_summary: Cummings introduces Photo Finish Live, detailing its development, integration with Web3, and partnership with the Kentucky Derby. He reflects on the current state of Web3 gaming and calls for collaboration to enhance the industry.
